import json, os, pprint, pathlib, sys, re, difflib
import json, codecs, os, io, sys, pandas as pd

# List files in /mnt/data
import os, json, re, textwrap, io, sys
os.listdir('/mnt/data')[:10]

# Load hadith json
import json, os, re, textwrap, io, sys
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-PsCHPvto4q2ok5FZiACgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
len(hadith_data), type(hadith_data)

# Let's inspect structure of first record
hadith_data[0].keys(), hadith_data[0]

# Show sample matches focusing on phrase "بين الأختين" 
[m for m in matches[:5]], matches[0][1]

# Search for occurrences of "الأختين" or "الأختين" diacritics maybe none
matches_akhtain = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('Matn') or '')
    if 'الأختين' in text or 'الأُختين' in text or 'اختين' in text:
        matches_akhtain.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(matches_akhtain)
matches_akhtain[:2][0][1], matches_akhtain[0][2][:300]
matches_akhtain[0][2][300:900]
matches_akhtain[0][2][900:1800]

# Look for "أُختَيَّ" or "أختيَّ" exact
candidates = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('Matn') or '')
    if 'أُختَيَّ' in text or 'أختَيَّ' in text or 'أُخْتَيَّ' in text or 'أُخْتَيّ' in text:
        candidates.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(candidates)
results[:3]

res2 = find_substring('لا تتزوج')
len(res2), res2[:3]

res3 = find_substring('لا تُنكح')
len(res3), res3[:3]

res3b = find_substring('لا تنكح')
len(res3b)

# Let's inspect one about "لا تنكح المرأة على عمتها ولا على خالتها"
cands = []
for rec in res3b:
    text = rec[2]
    if 'المرأة' in text and 'عمتها' in text:
        cands.append(rec)
len(cands), cands[:2]

# search for 'أختها' with "لا تنكح"
cand2 = []
for rec in res3b:
    text = rec[2]
    if 'أختها' in text:
        cand2.append(rec)
len(cand2), cand2[:3]

# Search for "لا تزوج" near "أختي" 
proxs = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('Matn') or '')
    if 'أختي' in text and 'تزوج' in text:
        proxs.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(proxs)

# Display these 
for i, rec in enumerate(proxs[:10]):
    hid, title, text = rec
    # highlight snippet
    idx1 = text.find('أختي')
    idx2 = text.find('تزوج')
    snippet = text[max(0, min(idx1, idx2)-100): min(len(text), max(idx1, idx2)+200)]
    print(i, hid, title)
    print(snippet.replace('أختي','<<أختي>>').replace('تزوج','<<تزوج>>'))
    print('---')

# Find hadiths with "أم حبيبة" and "أختي" to extract exact canonical text
umhabi_matches = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('Matn') or '')
    if 'أم حبيبة' in text and 'أختي' in text:
        umhabi_matches.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(umhabi_matches)

# Display some
for hid, title, text in umhabi_matches[:5]:
    idx = text.find('أختي')
    print(hid, title)
    print(text[max(0, idx-120): idx+300])
    print('---')

# Inspect record 15803 details to get 'hadithTxt' and 'Matn'
rec = next(r for r in hadith_data if r['hadithID']==15803)
rec.keys(), rec['title'], rec['Matn'][:500] if rec['Matn'] else None
print(rec['Matn'])

# Search for strings including both لا and أخت, or "أختي" + "لا"
bad = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('Matn') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '')
    if 'أختي' in text and 'لا ' in text:
        bad.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(bad)

# Narrow to those with "أُختي" with hamzah?
bad2 = []
for rec in hadith_data:
    text = (rec.get('Matn') or '') + ' ' + (rec.get('hadithTxt') or '')
    if 'أختي' in text and ('تزوج' in text or 'تنكح' in text):
        bad2.append((rec['hadithID'], rec['title'], text))
len(bad2)

# Show these to see any "لا تزوج"
for hid, title, text in bad2:
    if 'لا' in text:
        idx = text.find('أختي')
        s = text[max(0, idx-200): idx+200]
        print(hid, title)
        print(s.replace('أختي','<<أختي>>'))
        print('---')

rec2 = next(r for r in hadith_data if r['hadithID']==15805)
print(rec2['Matn'][:800])

with open('/mnt/data/file-EQ8EzHw2wRiCnKf3M2V5vG-16_C-Q03.txt','r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    print(f.read()[:2000])

# Ro check the Matn in 91769 to see if present
rec3 = next(r for r in hadith_data if r['hadithID']==91769)
print(rec3['Matn'])

content.text: {"correction":"دَخَلَ عَلَيَّ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ، فَقُلْتُ لَهُ : هَلْ لَكَ فِي أُخْتِي بِنْتِ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ ؟ فَقَالَ : أَفْعَلُ مَاذَا ؟ قُلْتُ : تَنْكِحُهَا . قَالَ : أَوَ تُحِبِّينَ ذَلِكَ ؟ قُلْتُ : لَسْتُ لَكَ بِمُخْلِيَةٍ وَأَحَبُّ مَنْ شَرِكَنِي فِي الْخَيْرِ أُخْتِي . قَالَ : فَإِنَّهَا لَا تَحِلُّ لِي . قُلْتُ : فَإِنِّي أُخْبِرْتُ أَنَّكَ تَخْطُبُ دُرَّةَ بِنْتَ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ . قَالَ : بِنْتَ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ ؟ قُلْتُ : نَعَمْ . قَالَ : لَوْ أَنَّهَا لَمْ تَكُنْ رَبِيبَتِي فِي حَجْرِي مَا حَلَّتْ لِي ، إِنَّهَا ابْنَةُ أَخِي مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ أَرْضَعَتْنِي وَأَبَاهَا ثُوَيْبَةُ ، فَلَا تَعْرِضْنَ عَلَيَّ بَنَاتِكُنَّ ، وَلَا أَخَوَاتِكُنَّ"}
